address.address1: Jl. Sengeda no.99 Nunang Antara, Bebesen

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Recommendation. We stayed here for 2 nights, it was comfortable. And we got breakfast. The location is in the city center, close to places to eat. It's nice to look for snacks at night. Not far from Lake Laut Tawar, there is also a hot spring bath.
comments.originalComment:
Rekomendasi. Kami 2 malam menginap di sini, nyaman. 
Dan dapat sarapan.
Lokasi yg di tengah kota, dekat dengan tempat kuliner. 
Kalau malam enak cari jajanan. 
Tidak jauh dari Danau Laut tAwar, 
Ada mandi air panasnya juga..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
C est un ancien restaurant transformé en chambre d hôtel 
Les chambres sont vraiment inhospitalières et les murs en carton
comments.reviewPositives:
L eau chaude mais de courte durée 
L emplacement permettant d être immergé au centre de la ville Indonésienne

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Not given a double bed, smelly bed sheets, and no waiting area for guests.
comments.originalComment: Tidak di kasih bad dabel, seprei tempat tidur bau, dan tidak ada ruang tunggu untuk tamu

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: ゆっくり寝ていたいのに朝ごはんで7時半に起こされる。
comments.reviewPositives:
スタッフが親切
町の中心部だが静か
ホットシャワー

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Overall, it's worth it with the price plus getting delicious fried rice for breakfast. However, I think the blanket is a bit thin; for cold areas, it should be thicker.
comments.originalComment: Overall bolehlah worth it dgn harga plus dpt sarapan nasi goreng yg enak. Cuma selimut kurang tebal sih menurut saya utk daerah dingin hrsnya lebih tebal lagi

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Lokasi strategis
Dekat dengan pusat kota
Parkir aman dan dilengkapi dengan CCTV
Terdapat water heater, sehingga mau jam berapapun mandi tidak menjadi masalah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Das Zimmer ist zentral, sehr einfach, aber mit Dusche und WC. Es gibt Tee und Kaffee und die Vermieterin ist sehr sehr freundlich und bringt tolles indonesisches Frühstück ans Zimmer. Sehr zu empfehlen für Anspruchslose
Sehr zu empfehlen für anspruchslose

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: I check in and left 30 minutes later. This place is dirty to be rent or listed on Booking.com .
comments.reviewTitle: left after 30 minutes after checked in
